caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSS TALK 101" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black coffee mug featuring red and white text. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring logos with five gold stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "TALK 101." In the lower-left corner, a small circular logo reads "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and shoulders. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and in the final frame, his right hand is partially visible, gesturing as he continues to speak into the microphone.
